meta.summary: trimAl 1.5.1 alignment trimming suite, including trimal, readal, and statal.
meta.description: trimAl 1.5.1 alignment trimming suite, including trimal, readal, and statal.

test: trimal --version 2>&1 | grep -F 'trimAl v1.5.rev1 build[2025-11-25]' >/dev/null && readal --version 2>&1 | grep -F 'readAl v1.5.rev1 build[2025-11-25]' >/dev/null && statal --version 2>&1 | grep -F 'statAl v1.5.rev1 build[2025-11-25]' >/dev/null

trimal -h 2>&1 | grep -F 'Basic usage' >/dev/null && trimal -h 2>&1 | grep -F -- '-automated1' >/dev/null && readal -h 2>&1 | grep -F 'readal -in <inputfile>' >/dev/null && statal -h 2>&1 | grep -F 'statal -in <inputfile>' >/dev/null

tmp=/tmp/taf-trimal-core-$$; rm -rf "$tmp"; mkdir -p "$tmp"; cp /opt/trimal/share/doc/trimal/dataset/example.004.AA.fasta "$tmp/in.fa" && trimal -in "$tmp/in.fa" -out "$tmp/auto.fa" -automated1 -htmlout "$tmp/report.html" && test -s "$tmp/auto.fa" && test -s "$tmp/report.html" && trimal -in "$tmp/in.fa" -out "$tmp/nogaps.fa" -nogaps && test -s "$tmp/nogaps.fa" && readal -in "$tmp/in.fa" -out "$tmp/converted.phy" -phylip && test -s "$tmp/converted.phy" && statal -in "$tmp/in.fa" -sgt > "$tmp/gap.tsv" && test -s "$tmp/gap.tsv" && rm -rf "$tmp"

tmp=/tmp/taf-trimal-backtrans-$$; rm -rf "$tmp"; mkdir -p "$tmp"; cp /opt/trimal/share/doc/trimal/dataset/example.091.AA.strNOG.ENOG411BWBU.fasta "$tmp/aa.fa" && cp /opt/trimal/share/doc/trimal/dataset/example.091.AA.strNOG.ENOG411BWBU.codon.fa "$tmp/codon.fa" && trimal -in "$tmp/aa.fa" -backtrans "$tmp/codon.fa" -out "$tmp/backtrans.fa" -automated1 && test -s "$tmp/backtrans.fa" && rm -rf "$tmp"
